safety.secret_handling: No env file contents or credential values were intentionally captured. Remote URLs with embedded tokens are recorded only in redacted form.

/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked.reason: Docker compose labels and systemd units route active CallScore workers/read APIs through this path. It also contains current dirty implementation work.

/srv/agents/repos/crypto-tuber-ranked.reason: Clean git checkout with only two tracked product files and no observed live routing proof. It has linked worktrees under the same git common dir, so treat the gitdir as shared state until worktree owners are reviewed.

/srv/agents/crypto-tuber-ranked.reason: Branch is aligned with origin and its HEAD is an ancestor of the active /opt repo, but it has one untracked script that writes pipeline_jobs when run. No active cron/systemd/docker proof points here.

/srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/ap.reason: This is tracked inside the callscore-workplane repo, not a standalone git checkout. It has no app-subtree dirty work and no observed runtime routing, but it is part of the control-plane evidence repository.

hermes-worker.service has WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked and ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker compose up -d hermes-worker
callscore-enqueue.service has WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked and runs node --import tsx src/scripts/callscore-enqueue-server.ts
callscore-read-api.service has WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked and runs node src/scripts/callscore-read-api-server.mjs
process table contains esbuild children under /opt/crypto-tuber-ranked/node_modules
risk_notes: Active runtime source; keep protected until a later phase proves all Docker/systemd/process routes have moved.
Contains substantial dirty/untracked user/agent work; no cleanup command should touch it.

tree_comparison_summary.method: Python os.walk + SHA-256 for files <=2MB after excluding git/dependency/build/cache/env paths; comparison is advisory and should be followed by targeted git diff before any retirement.

evidence: Docker compose labels for running CallScore/crypto-tuber-ranked containers point to /opt/crypto-tuber-ranked and /opt/crypto-tuber-ranked/docker-compose.yml.
systemd units callscore-enqueue.service, callscore-read-api.service, and hermes-worker.service use WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked.
No inspected docker/systemd/cron/process route points to the two /srv/agents crypto-tuber-ranked paths or to workplane/apps/callscore-web.
not_proven: No production provider/deploy mutation or external Netlify verification was performed by this task.
This classification does not prove a path is safe to delete; it only identifies what must be captured/reviewed before a later deletion phase.
